keyPointsSummary: A paragraph starts with one clear topic sentence stating the main idea
Supporting sentences give reasons, examples, or details
Keep tense consistent throughout the paragraph
End with a short concluding or reflective sentence

quickQuiz.hindi: मेरा पसंदीदा मौसम बारिश का मौसम है।
quickQuiz.answer: My favourite season is the rainy season.

quickQuiz.hindi: बारिश में सब कुछ हरा-भरा हो जाता है।
quickQuiz.answer: Everything becomes green in the rain.

quickQuiz.hindi: मुझे किताबें पढ़ना बहुत पसंद है।
quickQuiz.answer: I like reading books a lot.

quickQuiz.hindi: किताबें ज्ञान का भंडार होती हैं।
quickQuiz.answer: Books are a treasure of knowledge.

quickQuiz.hindi: वहाँ हरे-भरे खेत और साफ हवा है।
quickQuiz.answer: There are green fields and clean air there.

quickQuiz.hindi: शिक्षा जीवन में बहुत महत्वपूर्ण है।
quickQuiz.answer: Education is very important in life.

quickQuiz.hindi: यह हमें एक बेहतर इंसान बनाती है।
quickQuiz.answer: It makes us a better person.
We should make good use of time.

quickQuiz.hindi: जो समय बर्बाद करता है, वह पछताता है।
quickQuiz.answer: The one who wastes time regrets later.

mustRememberRules: A paragraph starts with one clear topic sentence stating the main idea
Supporting sentences give reasons, examples, or details
Keep tense consistent throughout the paragraph
End with a short concluding or reflective sentence
